task_input: Core router CR-04 dropped all BGP sessions at 02:13; downstream OLT sites in region south lost upstream connectivity. Customer impact confirmed across 40k subscribers.

gold_answer.rationale: Full loss of upstream connectivity for an entire region with confirmed customer impact is a cascading outage.

task_input: Aggregation switch AGG-12 reports one of two uplinks down; traffic rerouted over the redundant path, utilization at 78%, no customer complaints.

gold_answer.rationale: Redundancy lost but service is still being delivered; elevated utilization creates risk without current customer impact.

task_input: Nightly config backup for edge router ER-31 failed with a timeout; second consecutive failure. Device is forwarding traffic normally.

gold_answer.rationale: Operational hygiene issue with no service impact; repeated failure warrants a ticket but not urgent response.

task_input: NMS dashboard shows a cosmetic label mismatch for cell site CS-201: displayed name differs from inventory record. No alarms, no traffic impact.

gold_answer.rationale: Cosmetic inventory mismatch only; informational cleanup task with zero service risk.

task_input: Core router CR-04 dropped BGP to both route reflectors RR-01 and RR-02; downstream OLT-SOUTH-7 lost upstream. Suspected line card LC-3 fault on CR-04.
Fiber cut on span FS-118 between POP-EAST and POP-CENTRAL; DWDM node DW-22 raised loss-of-signal alarms.
Firmware crash loop on baseband unit BBU-77 at cell site CS-310; sector antennas S1 and S2 offline, S3 degraded.
DNS resolver cluster DNS-C2 returning SERVFAIL for 12% of queries after last night's config push CP-2291.

At 02:13 core router CR-04 dropped all BGP sessions. Region south lost upstream connectivity for 47 minutes. 40k broadband subscribers and 2 enterprise VPN customers affected. Root cause suspected line card fault; failover to CR-05 completed 03:00.

gold_answer.summary: Core router CR-04 dropped all BGP sessions at 02:13, cutting upstream connectivity for region south for 47 minutes until failover to CR-05 completed at 03:00. Suspected line card fault.
gold_answer.impact: 40k broadband subscribers and 2 enterprise VPN customers lost connectivity for 47 minutes.

task_input: Voicemail platform VM-CLUSTER-A degraded 14:20-15:05; message deposit failed for roughly 8% of attempts. Mobile voice calls unaffected. Restarted stuck worker pool; monitoring.

gold_answer.summary: Voicemail platform VM-CLUSTER-A was degraded from 14:20 to 15:05 with about 8% of message deposits failing; a stuck worker pool was restarted and the platform is being monitored.
gold_answer.impact: Roughly 8% of voicemail deposits failed for 45 minutes; voice calls unaffected.

task_input: Planned maintenance on DWDM ring R-EAST overran by 2 hours due to a faulty transceiver. Protected traffic rode the west path; no customer impact recorded.

gold_answer.summary: Planned maintenance on DWDM ring R-EAST overran by two hours because of a faulty transceiver; protected traffic used the west path throughout.
gold_answer.impact: No customer impact; maintenance window overran by 2 hours.

task_input: SMS gateway SG-3 queued outbound messages for 25 minutes after a certificate expired on the SMPP peer link to partner P-TEL. Queue drained after cert renewal; max delay 25 minutes, no loss.

gold_answer.summary: SMS gateway SG-3 queued outbound messages for 25 minutes after the SMPP peer-link certificate to partner P-TEL expired; the queue drained fully after certificate renewal.
gold_answer.impact: Outbound SMS delayed up to 25 minutes; no message loss.

task_input: Core router CR-04 line card LC-3 suspected faulty after BGP flap outage; currently on failover to CR-05 with no redundancy remaining. 40k subscribers on the failover path.

gold_answer.action: Dispatch field engineering to replace line card LC-3 on CR-04 and restore redundancy.
gold_answer.justification: 40k subscribers are running on a failover path with no remaining redundancy; a second failure would cause a full regional outage.

task_input: Aggregation switch AGG-12 lost one of two uplinks; redundant path holding at 78% utilization during peak. Fiber team estimates repair feasible in tomorrow's window.

gold_answer.action: Schedule uplink fiber repair for tomorrow's maintenance window and set a utilization alert at 90% on the surviving path.
gold_answer.justification: Service is stable on the redundant path at 78% peak utilization; repair fits the next window with an alert guarding against congestion.

task_input: Edge router ER-31 nightly config backup failed twice with timeouts; device forwarding normally, backup server reachable from other devices.

gold_answer.action: Open a ticket to investigate ER-31 backup timeouts and verify management-plane connectivity from the device.
gold_answer.justification: No service impact; repeated backup failure is isolated to ER-31 and needs routine investigation before it hides a config-recovery risk.

task_input: DNS resolver cluster DNS-C2 returning SERVFAIL for 12% of queries since config push CP-2291 last night. Error rate steady, not growing. Rollback tested in staging.

gold_answer.action: Roll back config push CP-2291 on DNS-C2 using the staged rollback.
gold_answer.justification: 12% query failure is ongoing customer impact and the rollback is already validated in staging, making it the fastest safe mitigation.
